achievements.title: Accepted at KTH Royal Institute of Technology
achievements.description: Accepted as a researcher at KTH Sweden's prestigious program in advanced telecommunications and network engineering.

achievements.title: Senior Engineer at NOKIA
achievements.description: Promoted to Senior Engineer position at NOKIA, leading research initiatives in 5G and network optimization.

achievements.title: 8 Publications in Peer-Reviewed Venues
achievements.description: Published research papers in signal processing, communication systems, and embedded systems across top-tier journals and conferences.

achievements.title: MTech from IIITDM Kancheepuram
achievements.description: Graduated with Master of Technology in Signal Processing & Communication Systems from IIITDM Kancheepuram with distinction.

achievements.title: BTech (Honors) from IIITDM Kancheepuram
achievements.description: Completed Bachelor of Technology (Honors) in Electronics and Communication Engineering with strong academic performance.

achievements.title: Research Excellence in Signal Processing
achievements.description: Recognized for outstanding contributions to research in signal processing algorithms and communication system design.

achievements.title: NOKIA Innovation Award
achievements.description: Awarded for innovative contributions to 5G network optimization and machine learning-based resource allocation.

achievements.title: Guest Lecturer at Technical Universities
achievements.description: Invited as a guest lecturer to conduct seminars on 5G technologies, signal processing, and IoT systems.
